prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-10LBSBBPAYDIRTKIT-17PC-KH-AMZ Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Complete Khaki Backpack Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit with 10lb Bobby Bo Intermediate Gold Paydirt, 17pc Description: The ASR Outdoor 17pc Gold Panning Kit with 5 Gallon Bucket, 50 Inch Folding Sluice Box and 10lbs Bobby Bo Paydirt is intended for end to end raw material processing in the field, but with the included ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo 10lb paydirt bag, avid prospectors can continue to practice and develop gold panning skills and techniques off site. Moreover, the included five gallon bucket, large capacity ASR Outdoor canvas rucksack and 50 Inch folding aluminum sluice box with shoulder strap, make this gold panning kit and included gold prospecting equipment easily transportable.

Important gold prospecting equipment to take note of included in this ASR Outdoor gold panning kit:

50 Inch Folding Sluice Box: Folding down to just 15 inches, this compact aluminum sluice box comes pre-assembled with built in miners moss, carpet and 18 gauge steel zinc-plated riffles, making it a high yield gold recovery gold mining tool Search Terms: gold rush gold mining tools adult hobby kits sluice box paydirt gold mining equipment gifts for him rock hounding equipment outdoor activities for kids camping gear travel sports and outdoors gold prospecting equipment summer Features: - GOLD PANNING KIT: A portable kit for the avid prospector, we've included all the necessary gold prospecting equipment for end to end processing, as well as a 10lb bag of ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo intermediate paydirt for continued off site gold panning skill and technique development - 10LBS GOLD PAYDIRT: 10lb bag of Bobby Bo unclassified paydirt ranks between intermediate and advanced paydirt for the more experienced prospector; paydirt features fine gold, large gravels and significant amounts of black sand that require classification work - 50 INCH FOLDING SLUICE BOX: This aluminum sluice box features built in 18 gauge steel zinc-plated riffles, carpet and woven vinyl miners moss; Sluice box easily fits into included canvas rucksack or 5 gallon bucket; no assembly required and includes shoulder strap - 5 GALLON BUCKET: Heavy duty plastic bucket with carry handle works in conjunction with large classifier screens (1/8 and 1/4 inch); stack sifting screens on top of bucket to create a seamless classification system, ideal for removing unwanted raw material from paydirt concentrate - 17PC PROSPECTING TOOLS: Snifter bottles, glass vials, magnifying tweezers, 8lb magnetic separator, scoop, single and dual riffle gold pans, canvas backpack, rock pick hammer, classifier screens, 5 gallon bucket and 50 inch folding sluice box === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10lb Khaki Gold Panning Kit Sluice Box 17pc

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10-lb Khaki Backpack Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit

tokens.name: Backpack Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 17-Piece Complete Kit, 50-Inch Folding Sluice Box, Canvas Backpack, 5-Gallon Bucket, Classifier Screens, Bobby Bo Paydirt

openai.title_differentiation: 10 Lb Intermediate Paydirt, 17 Pc Prospecting Tools, 50 Inch Folding Sluice Box, 5 Gallon Bucket, Canvas Backpack
